title: althenia orientalis subsp. orientalis
intro: Althenia orientalis subsp. orientalis, also known as Oriental althenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds. Althenia orientalis subsp. orientalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
